resourceTemplates.name: facebook-profile
resourceTemplates.title: Get Facebook profile
resourceTemplates.description: Returns public Facebook profile information. Use either a profile `url` or `pageId` when available.

resourceTemplates.name: facebook-profile-posts
resourceTemplates.title: Get Facebook profile posts
resourceTemplates.description: Returns public posts from a Facebook page/profile visible in public browsing. Use `pageId` for faster lookups, or `url` when page id is not known. Supports pagination with `cursor` if available.

resourceTemplates.name: facebook-profile-reels
resourceTemplates.title: Get Facebook profile reels
resourceTemplates.description: Returns public reels from a Facebook page. To paginate, pass both `next_page_id` and `cursor` from the previous response together.

resourceTemplates.name: facebook-post
resourceTemplates.title: Get Facebook post or reel
resourceTemplates.description: Returns details for a public Facebook post or reel by URL.

resourceTemplates.name: facebook-post-comments
resourceTemplates.title: Get Facebook post comments
resourceTemplates.description: Returns comments for a public Facebook post or reel. Supports pagination with `cursor` when provided by the API.

resourceTemplates.name: facebook-post-transcript
resourceTemplates.title: Get Facebook post transcript
resourceTemplates.description: Returns transcript data for a Facebook post or reel when speech is available.

resourceTemplates.name: facebook-group-posts
resourceTemplates.title: Get Facebook group posts
resourceTemplates.description: Returns public posts from a Facebook group. Facebook limits retrieval to small batches, and `cursor` can be used when supported.
